title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates how Claude Code was used to build a revenue-generating app ($481k annually) in 45 days with a non-technical founder. He shares five operational steps including problem-first thinking, workflow identification, vocabulary mastery, staged development, and failure prevention strategies.
